title: Warium Performant
description: This project fixes some performance issues in the mod warium
body:
This datapack fixes some if wariums performance issues.

Make sure to join the [discord](https://discord.gg/tFHRmnAtAN) for updates and to join the offical server!

### How its done:
The datapack clears lag by clearing all warium entity bullets every hour.

### Functions
There is currently 1 usable function in the datapack, /function wariumperformant:fixlag which fixes the bullets aswell.

### Installing
To install, simply download the .zip, copy it, go to your instance/saves/[yourworld/datapacks and paste it.
More will be added in the future
